## Type of Change

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (change that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please confirm the following:

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes.
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation where necessary.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have updated public API types (`types/*.d.ts`) if required.
- [ ] This PR addresses a single feature or bug and does not include unrelated changes.

Add any additional information for reviewers that may help during the review process.
